author: steve

patch.value: Governs the 2026-05-24 continuation production readiness session.\n\nAll primary checks pass. Upstream pm-cli issue #53 (npm install not providing node_modules for extension SDK) was found closed without resolution and has been reopened with fresh evidence.

Full production readiness continuation pass for pm-changelog: TypeScript check, 18 tests, security audit, pack dry-run, changelog freshness check, temp local install test, GitHub repo config check, and upstream pm-cli issue tracking.

- npm run release:check passes all gates (TypeScript, tests, audit, pack, changelog)
- Local pm install temp test works and generates correct output
- No untracked open issues in pm-changelog or pm-cli affecting this package
- GitHub repo is correctly configured (public, issues enabled)
- Git history has no private data

value.author: steve
value.text: Session evidence: 18/18 tests pass,0 vulns,pack dry-run OK,changelog up to date,GitHub repo public,latest release v2026.05.24-3.

value.author: steve
value.text: npm install npm:pm-changelog is broken upstream (pm-cli #53 reopened). CI uses local install path which works correctly.

value.author: steve
value.text: pm install npm:X does not install node_modules for extension SDK imports - tracked upstream in pm-cli #53. Local path install works.

message: Create production readiness epic for 2026-05-24 session 2
